超能力惩恶扬善收女爽爽爽","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":15,"text":"超能力","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B6%85%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774117869BB1C22E8%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227584350883478717246%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227566185057170246680%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B6%85%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765873975,"group_id":"7566185057170246680","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只看爽文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx4lFeG03TRvpxyz/FpPOig0afqltDh77PQHB1Y1SSBT","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/40d6ac38e4a9439cbdfbdbbf9288fc64~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709324&x-signature=kaG%2BeC%2FFX3yIzKSYeqVXIALMInk%3D","user_id":"2399575158848448","user_name":"武神300"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2399575158848448","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7566185057170246680","book_info":{"abstract":"超能力影视剧大集锦+弥补遗憾+美女多+不圣母+苟道。
从伊甸湖烧死那帮混混少年开始，卡尔注定要走上一条亦正亦邪的超凡之路。
副本包括但不限于:伊甸湖，隐形人，魔女嘉莉，超能失控，无法治愈，超能计划，超人高校，地狱男爵，蜘蛛侠，吸血鬼，希腊神话，X战警，黑袍+V世代，漫威电影宇宙，DC电影宇宙……敬请期待！
“星光，我请你吃鱼子酱”
“瑞雯，你说你能变成任何人？我认识一些樱花老师，你看……”
“戴安娜，你这五千年从来没出过岛？也没见过男人？”
“旺达，听说你喜欢孩子？巧了，我也喜欢”
“彼得，我跟你说，能力越大，权利越大”
“雅各布，记住，二哈成不了狼，舔狗上不了床”
“班纳，你全身都变色了，也不在乎多一点吧”
“布鲁斯，花过多少冤枉钱，决定你有多大气度”
万磁王：“卡尔，你怎么比我还激进啊？”
祖国人：“你怎么也有激光眼，什么，你说我是山寨货？”
托尼•史塔克：“卡尔，你小子比我更适合花花公子这个称号”
紫薯精：“你赞同我的理念，太好了卡尔，等等，你怎么抢我宝石？”
达克赛德:“就他妈你叫卡尔啊，我要把你的脑袋摘下来当球踢……别打了别打了，我发誓再也不入侵地星了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07bac0520812fe06f254a8036da2a37a","author":"白月老登","author_id":"","book_id":"7566185057170246680","book_name":"逍遥超英诸天：大小洋马来来来","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4158人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7576854072364368408","read_count":"4158","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"354313"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.7","serial_count":"171","tags":"男频衍生,衍生,同人,系统,穿越,综影视","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ad6b66e8b262c61c6677646daa1f06c6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301869&x-signature=h8L9QnhIwjRQJfiYiOPtRicg7CQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"596389636102297","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"79"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023109A4AEF124DBD8BB1C22E8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_cou
